scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:frontend" "npm run dev:electron"
scripts.web: concurrently -n daemon,backend,frontend,browser -c blue,green,magenta,gray "npm run dev:daemon" "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:frontend" "npm run open:web"
scripts.build: npm run --workspace=src/shared build && npm run --workspace=src/backend build && npm run --workspace=src/frontend build && npm run --workspace=electron build && npm run build:daemon
scripts.typecheck: npm run --workspace=src/shared build && npm run --workspace=src/backend typecheck && npm run --workspace=src/frontend typecheck
scripts.prepackage: npm run build && npm run stage:services && node scripts/prune-foreign-natives.cjs && npm run stage:node
scripts.tauri:build: npm run prepackage && npm run --workspace=tauri build
